Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.Parser

Packages that use Parser
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.config
Configuration Support
org.apache.juneau.examples.parser
Parser Examples
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections
Collections classes.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5
JSON5 Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
Marshallers
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.

Parser API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse
Server-Sent Events (SSE) marshalling support — text/event-stream.

TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.

org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding

org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml

Next-generation REST client — transport-agnostic HTTP client built on Juneau's serialization stack.

  • Uses of Parser in org.apache.juneau.config

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.config with parameters of type Parser
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> Optional<T>
    Entry.as(Parser parser, Class<T> type)
    Returns this entry converted to the specified type.
    <T> Optional<T>
    Entry.as(Parser parser, Type type, Type... args)
    Same as Entry.as(Type, Type...) but specifies the parser to use to parse the entry.
    Optional<JsonList>
    Entry.asList(Parser parser)
    Returns this entry as a parsed list.
    Optional<JsonMap>
    Entry.asMap(Parser parser)
    Returns this entry as a parsed map.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description

  • Uses of Parser in org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson

    Subclasses of Parser in org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BsonParser
    Parses BSON (Binary JSON) into POJO models.
    static class 
    BsonParser.Base64
    Default parser, string input encoded as BASE64.
    static class 
    BsonParser.SpacedHex
    Default parser, string input encoded as spaced-hex.

    Method
    Description

    MarshalledList.ofString(Reader in, Parser p)

    Subclasses of Parser in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JsonLdParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing JSON-LD into POJOs.
    class 
    N3Parser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing N3 (Notation3) into POJOs.
    class 
    NQuadsParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing N-Quads into POJOs.
    class 
    NTripleParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing N-Triples into POJOs.
    class 
    RdfJsonParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing RDF/JSON into POJOs.
    class 
    RdfParser
    Parses RDF into POJOs.
    class 
    RdfProtoParser
    Stream-based RDF parser for RDF/PROTO binary format.
    class 
    RdfStreamParser
    Stream-based RDF parser for binary formats (RDF/THRIFT, RDF/PROTO).
    class 
    RdfThriftParser
    Stream-based RDF parser for RDF/THRIFT binary format.
    class 
    RdfXmlParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing RDF/XML into POJOs.
    class 
    TriGParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing TriG into POJOs.
    class 
    TriXParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing TriX (XML) into POJOs.
    class 
    TurtleParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing Turtle into POJOs.

    Class
    Description
    class

    Subclass of Parser for byte-based parsers.
    static class 
    Parser.Null
    Represents no Parser.

    ParserSet.Inherit
    An identifier that the previous entries in this group should be inherited.

    ParserSet.NoInherit
    An identifier that the previous entries in this group should not be inherited.

    ReaderParser
    Subclass of Parser for characters-based parsers.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Parser>
    ParserSet.getParser(String contentTypeHeader)
    Same as ParserSet.getParserMatch(String) but returns just the matched parser.
    Optional<Parser>
    ParserSet.getParser(MediaType mediaType)
    Same as ParserSet.getParserMatch(MediaType) but returns just the matched parser.
    List<Parser>
    ParserSet.getParsers()
    Returns the parsers in this group.

    Method

    ParserSet.Builder.add(Parser... s)

  • Uses of Parser in org.apache.juneau.rest.client

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.client that return types with arguments of type Parser
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Parser>
    RestClient.getMatchingParser(String contentType)
    Returns the parser matching the given response Content-Type, or the explicitly-configured default parser.
    Optional<Parser>
    RestClient.getParserForMediaType(String mediaType)
    Returns the registered parser matching the given media type, or Optional.empty() if none matches.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.client with parameters of type Parser
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> T
    ResponseBody.as(Parser parser, Class<T> type)
    Parses the response body to type using the given parser.
    <T> T
    ResponseBody.asCursor(Parser parser, Class<T> type)
    Opens a token/record-streaming cursor over the response body using the given parser.
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.defaultParser(Parser value)
    Designates the default parser used when the response Content-Type is absent or matches no registered parser.
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.parser(Parser... value)
    Appends parsers (built into a ParserSet at build time if no set was supplied).

  • Uses of Parser in org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic with parameters of type Parser
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected RestResponse
    RestClient.createResponse(RestRequest request, HttpResponse httpResponse, Parser parser)
    Creates a RestResponse object from the specified HttpResponse object.
    <T> T
    RestClient.getRemote(Class<T> interfaceClass, Object rootUrl, Serializer serializer, Parser parser)
    Same as RestClient.getRemote(Class, Object) but allows you to override the serializer and parser used.
    <T> T
    RestClient.getRrpcInterface(Class<T> interfaceClass, Object uri, Serializer serializer, Parser parser)
    Same as RestClient.getRrpcInterface(Class, Object) but allows you to override the serializer and parser used.
    ResponseContent
    ResponseContent.parser(Parser value)
    Specifies the parser to use for this body.
    SELF
    RestClient.Builder.parser(Parser value)
    Parser.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.parser(Parser parser)
    Specifies the parser to use on the response body.
    SELF
    RestClient.Builder.parsers(Parser... value)
    Parsers.
